sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106165" key="u(anew=s" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑανεῶς·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰ αὐτά,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑανία</orth>, <sense id="n106165.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑηνία.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
